title: Identify proper sentence structure, subject, and predicate. (CO1)
content:
Identify proper sentence structure, subject, and predicate. (CO1)
Differentiate a complete sentence from a fragment, run-on, and comma splice. (CO1)
Write well-developed, well-organized paragraphs. (CO1)
Identify agreement and tenses in parts of speech. (CO1)
Recognize dangling modifiers and punctuation such as apostrophes, hyphens, and question marks and their proper usage. (CO1)
Analyze and correct grammatical and mechanical errors in a given passage. (CO1)
Identify commonly confused words, spellings, and proper abbreviations. (CO1)
Demonstrate the characteristics and organization of compare/contrast writing. (CO3)
Discuss compare/contrast writing. (CO3)
Develop an outline. (CO4)
Identify the parts of a thesis. (CO4)
Identify types of evidence that support a thesis. (CO4)
